heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the shops, restaurants, and service professionals of Boiling Springs and Cleveland County. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Boiling Springs and Cleveland County.
localP1: Boiling Springs is home to Gardner-Webb University, a major regional institution with over 3,000 students that has shaped the town since its founding as Boiling Springs High School in 1905. The town, originally named Metal and incorporated in 1911, takes its name from the natural bubbling springs that first drew settlers like the Hamricks, Greenes, and McSwains to the area. Today, Boiling Springs blends the vibrant energy of a college town with downtown merchants and service businesses that anchor Cleveland County.
localP2: We build for the people who keep this town going: the jewelry merchants and retail shops downtown, the restaurants and cafes, the professionals and small business owners who serve a community centered around Gardner-Webb. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Boiling Springs, Shelby, Kings Mountain, Forest City & the region
